title: You Died
description: Adds a Dark Souls inspired death screen
body:
## You Died
This mod adds a Dark Souls inspired death screen.

![Gif of death message](https://i.imgur.com/HLkriU1.gif "You Died")

#### Bugs/Ideas/Requests?
Post bugs/ideas/requests on my Github issue tracker.

#### Modpacks?
You are free to use this mod in modpacks.
